title: OAP Conformance Receipt
description: A signed attestation that a specific implementation, identified by its DID, has executed the OAP Conformance Test Suite at a pinned version against a pinned target and has demonstrated conformance with the listed Conformance Levels. Conformance Receipts are referenced from a Manifest through the conformance.receipt_uri field and are verifiable independently by any consuming Agent through the procedure described in RFC 0019 section 6.

receipt_id.description: Unique identifier for this conformance receipt.

did.description: DID of the implementation that ran the suite.

build_hash.description: Optional Git commit or container hash of the build under test.

deployment_uri.description: Optional public URI under which the tested deployment is reachable.

version.description: Semantic version of the test suite that was executed.

spec_version.description: Version of the OAP specification the suite tests, for example 1.0.

suite_commit.description: Git commit hash of the test suite at execution time.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the manifest fetched from the target during the run.

claimed_levels.description: Conformance Levels that the implementation claims to satisfy on the basis of this run. The optional -NC suffix denotes the Non-Commercial Profile (RFC 0025) and is permitted on L1 and L3 only.

profile.description: Optional Profile selector. 'non-commercial' MUST be used when any claimed_levels entry carries the -NC suffix (RFC 0025).

results_uri.description: Optional URI at which the full results JSON can be downloaded for independent verification.

fixtures_hash.description: Hash of the concatenated fixture file paths and contents used during the run.

results_hash.description: Hash of the canonical JSON serialization of the full results object.

attestor.description: Optional independent attestor who witnessed or re executed the run.

not_after.description: Receipts SHOULD declare an expiry, typically 90 days after issuance.

previous_receipt_hash.description: Hash of the previous Conformance Receipt issued for the same implementation, enabling a per implementation chain. Use 'genesis' for the first receipt.

value.description: Base64-encoded signature. Placeholder values reserved for development MUST be rejected by every conformant Verifier (RFC 0019 section 7.3).

peer_witnesses.description: Independent peer-witness signatures. Required at L4 (>=1) and L5 (>=3) per RFC 0019 section 7.1. Each witness MUST itself hold a current valid L4+ Conformance Receipt anchored in the OAP Registry (RFC 0026).

witness_did.description: DID of the peer witness implementation.

witness_receipt_uri.description: URI of the witness's own Conformance Receipt, used to verify it currently holds L4+.

signature.description: Base64-encoded signature over the canonical-JSON form of this Receipt with the peer_witnesses array stripped.

controller_org.description: Optional declared controlling organisation, used by Verifiers to enforce L5 independence (no two witnesses share a controller).

registry_anchor.description: Reference to the OAP Registry commit that anchors this Receipt (RFC 0026). Required for L4 and L5 to be considered current; OPTIONAL but RECOMMENDED for L1 through L3.

commit_sha.description: Full Git commit SHA of the merge commit that anchors this Receipt.

file_path.description: Path within the registry repo, typically implementations/<slug>.json.

merkle_proof.description: Optional Merkle proof for offline verification against a published registry root.

revenue.description: Required when any claimed_levels entry carries the -NC suffix (RFC 0025). Declares the funding model that justifies the Non-Commercial Profile.
